heading: Establishment of block grant program
label: 9858a Establishment of block grant program
text: The Secretary is authorized to make grants to States in accordance with the provisions of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1992— and made identical technical corrections to directory language of , which added this section.Pub. L. 102–401Pub. L. 102–586Pub. L. 101–508, § 5082(2)
